name: Sheresh Communes
street_level_visibility: Humans, Elves, and Halflings are resolved as the core, with Half-Elves retained as a conservative adjacency-based secondary race.
visitor_signal: Visitors to Sheresh Communes should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
